memoryArtifacts.headline: Henry Woodward - Tithing Man
memoryArtifacts.description:
Henry Woodward - Tithing-Man
taken from "Dawes-Gates Ancestral Lines"
vol. II, p. 841-848 by Mary Walton Ferris

Henry Woodward was the son of Thomas and Elizabeth (Tysen) Woodward of Much Woolton …

popularStory.headline: Henry Woodward
popularStory.description:
HENRY WOODWARD
	
HENRY WOODWARD came to New England in the “James” with Capt. Taylor, Master.  They left England on June 22, 1635, having embarked at Bristol on May 23, 1635.  There were about one hun …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Freedom Woodward於1642年7月出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特時，她的父親Dr. Henry Woodward33歲，母親Elizabeth Mather28歲。她於1662年12月18日與Jedediah Strong在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1681年5月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年38歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Freedom Woodward于1642年7月出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特时，她的父亲Dr. Henry Woodward33岁，母亲Elizabeth Mather28岁。她于1662年12月18日与Jedediah Strong在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1681年5月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年38岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

en.lifeSummary: When Freedom Woodward was born in July 1642, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Dr. Henry Woodward, was 33 and her mother, Elizabeth Mather, was 28. She married Jedediah Strong on 18 December 1662, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 10 daughters. She died on 17 May 1681, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 38, and was buried in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Freedom Woodward est née en juillet 1642, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Dr. Henry Woodward, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mather, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Jedediah Strong le 18 décembre 1662, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 mai 1681, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Freedom Woodward im Juli 1642 in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dr. Henry Woodward 33 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Mather 28. Sie hat am 18. Dezember 1662 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Jedediah Strong geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Mai 1681 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Freedom Woodward è nata il nel luglio 1642 nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Dr. Henry Woodward, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Mather, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Jedediah Strong il 18 dicembre 1662, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 17 maggio 1681, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Freedom Woodwardが1642年7月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターで生まれた時，父Dr. Henry Woodwardは33歳，母Elizabeth Matherは28歳であった。1662年12月18日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンでJedediah Strongと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1681年5月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで38歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터

ko.lifeSummary: Freedom Woodward(이)가 1642년 7월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dr. Henry Woodward(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Mather(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1662년 12월 18일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 Jedediah Strong(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1681년 5월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Freedom Woodward nasceu em julho de 1642, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Dr. Henry Woodward, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mather, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Jedediah Strong em 18 de dezembro de 1662, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de maio de 1681, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Freedom Woodward родилась июль 1642 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Dr. Henry Woodward было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mather, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jedediah Strong 18 декабря 1662 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она умерла 17 мая 1681 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Freedom Woodward nació en julio de 1642, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Dr. Henry Woodward, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mather, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Jedediah Strong el 18 de diciembre de 1662, en Northampton, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió el 17 de mayo de 1681, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
